ar:
وعن الأغر المزني رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إنه ليغان على قلبي، وإني لأستغفر الله في اليوم مائة مرة‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: "إنه ليغان على قلبي، وإني لأستغفر الله في اليوم مائة مرة" ((رواه مسلم)).
sunnah_ref_en: Al-Agharr Al-Muzani (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Sometimes I perceive a veil over my heart, and I supplicate Allah for forgiveness a hundred times in a day.".
iwh_en: Al-Agharr Al-Muzani (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Sometimes I perceive a veil over my heart, and I supplicate Allah for forgiveness a hundred times in a day.".
iwh_id: Al-Agharr Al-Muzani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Sometimes I perceive a veil over my heart, dan aku supplicate Allah for ampunan a hundred times in a day.".

ar: وعن أبي  هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ سمعت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  يقول “والله إني لأستغفر الله وأتوب إليه في اليوم أكثر من سبعين مرة‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: سمعت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يقول “والله إني لأستغفر الله وأتوب إليه في اليوم أكثر من سبعين مرة" ((رواه البخاري)).

matn_ar_clean: وعن أبي  هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ سمعت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  يقول “والله إني لأستغفر الله وأتوب إليه في اليوم أكثر من سبعين مرة‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said: I heard the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) saying, "I swear by Allah that I seek Allah's Pardon and turn to Him in repentance more than seventy times a day.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) said: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "I swear by Allah that I seek Allah's Pardon and turn to Him in repentance more than seventy times a day.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: I heard Rasulullah ﷺ saying, "I swear by Allah that I mencari Allah's Pardon dan turn to Him in repentance more than seventy times a day.".

ar:
وعنه رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏والذي نفسي بيده لو لم تذنبوا، لذهب الله تعالى بكم، ولجاء بقوم يذنبون فيستغفرون الله تعالى فيغفر لهم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean:

"والذي نفسي بيده لو لم تذنبوا، لذهب الله تعالى بكم، ولجاء بقوم يذنبون فيستغفرون الله تعالى فيغفر لهم" ((رواه مسلم)).
isnad_ar: وعنه رضي الله عنه قال:

matn_ar_clean:
قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم : 
"والذي نفسي بيده لو لم تذنبوا، لذهب الله تعالى بكم، ولجاء بقوم يذنبون فيستغفرون الله تعالى فيغفر لهم" ((رواه مسلم)).
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "By the One in Whose Hand my soul is! If you do not commit sins, Allah would replace you with a people who would commit sins and seek forgiveness from Allah; and Allah will certainly forgive them.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "By the One in Whose Hand my soul is! If you do not commit sins, Allah would replace you with a people who would commit sins and seek forgiveness from Allah; and Allah will certainly forgive them.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "By the One in Whose Hand my soul is! If you jangan commit sins, Allah would replace you with a orang-orang who would commit sins dan mencari ampunan from Allah; dan Allah will certainly forgive them.".

ar:
وعن بن عمر رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ كنا نعد لرسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  في المجلس الواحد مائة مرة‏:‏ ‏
"‏رب اغفر لي، وتب على إنك أنت التواب الرحيم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبوداود والترمذي‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏ وقال : (( حديث حسن صحيح غريب )) .

matn_ar: "رب اغفر لي، وتب على إنك أنت التواب الرحيم" ((رواه أبوداود والترمذي)). وقال : (( حديث حسن صحيح غريب )) .

sunnah_ref_en: Ibn 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) said: We counted Messenger's saying a hundred times during one single sitting: Rabb- ighfir li, wa tubb 'alayya, innaka Antat-Tawwabur-Rahim. (My Rubb! Forgive me and pardon me. Indeed, You are the Oft-Returning with compassion and Ever Merciful.".
iwh_en: Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with them) said: We counted Messenger's saying a hundred times during one single sitting: Rabb- ighfir li, wa tubb 'alayya, innaka Antat-Tawwabur-Rahim. (My Rubb! Forgive me and pardon me. Indeed, You are the Oft-Returning with compassion and Ever Merciful.".
iwh_id: Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhum) bersabda: We counted Messenger's saying a hundred times selama one single sitting: Rabb- ighfir li, wa tubb 'alayya, innaka Antat-Tawwabur-Rahim. (My Rubb! Forgive me dan pardon me. Indeed, You are the Oft-Returning with compassion and Ever Merciful.".

ar: وعن ابن عباس رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ “من لزم الاستغفار ، جعل الله له من كل ضيق مخرجاً ومن كل هم فرجاً، ورزقه من حيث لا يحتسب‏"‏ رواه أبو داود‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن ابن عباس رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم : “من لزم الاستغفار ، جعل الله له من كل ضيق مخرجاً ومن كل هم فرجاً، ورزقه من حيث لا يحتسب" رواه أبو داود.
isnad_ar: وعن ابن عباس رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم : “من لزم الاستغفار
matn_ar: جعل الله له من كل ضيق مخرجاً ومن كل هم فرجاً، ورزقه من حيث لا يحتسب" رواه أبو داود.
matn_ar_clean: جعل الله له من كل ضيق مخرجا ومن كل هم فرجا، ورزقه من حيث لا يحتسب" رواه أبو داود.
sunnah_ref_en: Ibn 'Abbas (May Allah be pleased with them) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "If anyone constantly seeks pardon (from Allah), Allah will appoint for him a way out of every distress and a relief from every anxiety, and will provide sustenance for him from where he expects not.".
iwh_en: Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them) said: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "If anyone constantly seeks pardon (from Allah), Allah will appoint for him a way out of every distress and a relief from every anxiety, and will provide sustenance for him from where he expects not.".
iwh_id: Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhum) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "If anyone constantly seeks pardon (from Allah), Allah will appoint for him a way out of every distress dan a relief from every anxiety, and will provide sustenance for him from where he expects not.".

ar:
وعن ابن مسعود رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏من قال‏:‏ أستغفر الله الذي لا إله إلا هو الحي القيوم وأتوب إليه ، غفرت ذنوبه ، وإن كان قد فر من الزحف‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه أبو داود والترمذي والحاكم، وقال‏:‏ حديث صحيح على شرط البخاري ومسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean:
وعن ابن مسعود رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم : 
"من قال: أستغفر الله الذي لا إله إلا هو الحي القيوم وأتوب إليه ، غفرت ذنوبه ، وإن كان قد فر من الزحف" ((رواه أبو داود والترمذي والحاكم، وقال: حديث صحيح على شرط البخاري ومسلم)).
isnad_ar: وعن ابن مسعود رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم :
matn_ar: "من قال: أستغفر الله الذي لا إله إلا هو الحي القيوم وأتوب إليه ، غفرت ذنوبه ، وإن كان قد فر من الزحف" ((رواه أبو داود والترمذي والحاكم، وقال: حديث صحيح على شرط البخاري ومسلم)).
matn_ar_clean: "من قال: أستغفر الله الذي لا إله إلا هو الحي القيوم وأتوب إليه ، غفرت ذنوبه ، وإن كان قد فر من الزحف" ((رواه أبو داود والترمذي والحاكم، وقال: حديث صحيح على شرط البخاري ومسلم)).
sunnah_ref_en: Ibn Mas'ud (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "He who says: 'Astaghfir ullah-alladhi la ilaha illa Huwal-Haiyul-Qayyumu, wa atubu ilaihi (I seek the forgiveness of Allah, there is no true god except Allah, the Ever-Living, the Self- Subsisting, and I turn to Him in repentance),' his sins will be forgiven even if he should have run away from the battlefield (while he was engaged in fighting for the Cause of Allah).".
iwh_en: Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "He who says: 'Astaghfir ullah-alladhi la ilaha illa Huwal-Haiyul-Qayyumu, wa atubu ilaihi (I seek the forgiveness of Allah, there is no true god except Allah, the Ever-Living, the Self- Subsisting, and I turn to Him in repentance),' his sins will be forgiven even if he should have run away from the battlefield (while he was engaged in fighting for the Cause of Allah).".
iwh_id: Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "He who bersabda: 'Astaghfir ullah-alladhi la ilaha illa Huwal-Haiyul-Qayyumu, wa atubu ilaihi (I mencari the ampunan of Allah, there is no true god except Allah, the Ever-Living, the Self- Subsisting, dan aku turn to Him in repentance),' his sins will be forgiven even if he should have berlari away from the battlefield (while he was engaged in fighting for the Cause of Allah).".

ar: وعن شداد بن أوس رضي الله عنه  عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏"‏سيد الإستغفار أن يقول العبد ‏:‏ اللهم أنت ربي، لا إله إلا أنت ، خلقتني وأنا عبدك، وأنا على عهدك ووعدك ما استطعت أعوذ بك من شر ما صنعت أبوء لك بنعمتك علي، وأبوء بذنبي، فاغفر لي فإنه لا يغفر الذنوب إلا أنت، من قالها من النهار موقنا بها، فمات من يومه قبل أن يمسي، فهو من أهل الجنة، ومن قالها من الليل وهو موقن بها فمات قبل أن يصبح، فهو من أهل الجنة” ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏ (1)
ar_clean: وعن شداد بن أوس رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: "سيد الإستغفار أن يقول العبد : اللهم أنت ربي، لا إله إلا أنت ، خلقتني وأنا عبدك، وأنا على عهدك ووعدك ما استطعت أعوذ بك من شر ما صنعت أبوء لك بنعمتك علي، وأبوء بذنبي، فاغفر لي فإنه لا يغفر الذنوب إلا أنت، من قالها من النهار موقنا بها، فمات من يومه قبل أن يمسي، فهو من أهل الجنة، ومن قالها من الليل وهو موقن بها فمات قبل أن يصبح، فهو من أهل الجنة” ((رواه البخاري)). (1)

matn_ar: لا إله إلا أنت ، خلقتني وأنا عبدك، وأنا على عهدك ووعدك ما استطعت أعوذ بك من شر ما صنعت أبوء لك بنعمتك علي، وأبوء بذنبي، فاغفر لي فإنه لا يغفر الذنوب إلا أنت، من قالها من النهار موقنا بها، فمات من يومه قبل أن يمسي، فهو من أهل الجنة، ومن قالها من الليل وهو موقن بها فمات قبل أن يصبح، فهو من أهل الجنة” ((رواه البخاري)). (1)
matn_ar_clean: لا إله إلا أنت ، خلقتني وأنا عبدك، وأنا على عهدك ووعدك ما استطعت أعوذ بك من شر ما صنعت أبوء لك بنعمتك علي، وأبوء بذنبي، فاغفر لي فإنه لا يغفر الذنوب إلا أنت، من قالها من النهار موقنا بها، فمات من يومه قبل أن يمسي، فهو من أهل الجنة، ومن قالها من الليل وهو موقن بها فمات قبل أن يصبح، فهو من أهل الجنة” ((رواه البخاري)). (1)
sunnah_ref_en: Shaddad bin Aus (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "The best supplication for seeking forgiveness (Syed-ul- Istighfar) is to say: 'Allahumma Anta Rabbi, la ilaha illa Anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bidhanbi faghfir li, fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta. (O Allah! You are my Rubb. There is no true god except You. You have created me, and I am Your slave, and I hold to Your Covenant as far as I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge the favours that You have bestowed upon me, and I confess my sins. Pardon me, for none but You has the power to pardon).' He who supplicates in these terms during the day with firm belief in it and dies on the same day (before the evening), he will be one of the dwellers of Jannah; and if anyone supplicates in these terms during the night with firm belief in it and dies before the morning, he will be one of the dwellers of Jannah.".
iwh_en: Shaddad bin Aus (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Prophet ﷺ said, "The best supplication for seeking forgiveness (Syed-ul- Istighfar) is to say: 'Allahumma Anta Rabbi, la ilaha illa Anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bidhanbi faghfir li, fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta. (O Allah! You are my Rubb. There is no true god except You. You have created me, and I am Your slave, and I hold to Your Covenant as far as I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge the favours that You have bestowed upon me, and I confess my sins. Pardon me, for none but You has the power to pardon).' He who supplicates in these terms during the day with firm belief in it and dies on the same day (before the evening), he will be one of the dwellers of Jannah; and if anyone supplicates in these terms during the night with firm belief in it and dies before the morning, he will be one of the dwellers of Jannah.".
iwh_id: Shaddad bin Aus (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: Nabi ﷺ berkata, "The best supplication for seeking ampunan (Syed-ul- Istighfar) is to say: 'Allahumma Anta Rabbi, la ilaha illa Anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bidhanbi faghfir li, fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta. (Ya Allah! You are my Rubb. There is no true god except You. You have created me, dan aku am Your slave, dan aku hold to Your Covenant as far as I can. Saya berlindung in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge the favours that You have bestowed upon me, dan aku confess my sins. Pardon me, for none namun You has the power to pardon).' Barangsiapa yang supplicates in these terms selama the day with firm belief in it dan dies on the same day (sebelum the evening), he will be one of the dwellers of Jannah; dan if anyone supplicates in these terms selama the night with firm belief in it dan dies sebelum the morning, he will be one of the dwellers of Jannah.".

ar: - وعن ثوبان رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  إذا انصرف من صلاته ، استغفر الله ثلاثاً وقال‏:‏ ‏"‏اللهم أنت السلام، ومنك السلام، تباركت يا ياذا الجلال والإكرام‏"‏ قيل للأوزاعي- وهو أحد رواته‏:‏ كيف الإستغفار‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ يقول‏:‏ ‏"‏أستغفر الله ، أستغفر الله‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: - وعن ثوبان رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  إذا انصرف من صلاته ، استغفر الله ثلاثا وقال‏:‏ ‏"‏اللهم أنت السلام، ومنك السلام، تباركت يا ياذا الجلال والإكرام‏"‏ قيل للأوزاعي- وهو أحد رواته‏:‏ كيف الإستغفار‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ يقول‏:‏ ‏"‏أستغفر الله ، أستغفر الله‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
sunnah_ref_en: Thauban (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: Whenever the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) finished his Salat (prayer), he would beg forgiveness three times .
iwh_en: Thauban (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that whenever the Messenger of Allah ﷺ finished his Salat (prayer), he would beg forgiveness three times .
iwh_id: Thauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa setiap kali Rasulullah ﷺ finished his Salat (shalat), ia beg ampunan three times .

ar:
وعن عائشة رضي الله عنها قالت‏:‏ كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  يكثر أن يقول قبل موته ‏
"‏سبحان الله وبحمده، أستغفر الله، وأتوب إليه‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) reported: Prior to his demise, the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) used to supplicate frequently: Subhan Allahi wa bihamdihi; Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilaihi (Allah is free from imperfection, and I begin with praising Him. I beg forgiveness from Allah and I turn to Him in repentance.".
iwh_en: 'Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) reported: Prior to his demise, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to supplicate frequently: Subhan Allahi wa bihamdihi; Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilaihi (Allah is free from imperfection, and I begin with praising Him. I beg forgiveness from Allah and I turn to Him in repentance.".
iwh_id: 'Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan: Prior to his demise, Rasulullah ﷺ biasa supplicate frequently: Subhan Allahi wa bihamdihi; Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilaihi (Allah is free from imperfection, dan aku memulai dengan praising Him. I beg ampunan from Allah dan aku turn to Him in repentance.".

ar: وعن أنس رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ سمعت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  يقول‏:‏ “قال الله تعالى‏:‏ يا ابن آدم إنك ما دعوتني ورجوتني غفرت لك ما كان منك ولا أبالي، يا ابن آدم لو بلغت ذنوبك عنان السماء، ثم استغفرتني ، غفرت لك ولا أبالي، يا ابن آدم إنك لو أتيتني بقراب الأرض خطايا، ثم لقيتني لا تشرك بي شيئاً، لأتيتك بقرابها مغفرة‏"‏ ‏.‏ (2)

sunnah_ref_en: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) said: I heard the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) saying, "Allah, the Exalted, has said: 'O son of Adam! I shall go on forgiving you so long as you pray to Me and aspire for My forgiveness whatever may be your sins. O son of Adam! I do not care even if your sins should pile up to the sky and should you beg pardon of Me, I would forgive you. O son of Adam! If you come to Me with an earthful of sins and meet Me, not associating anything with Me in worship, I will certainly grant you as much pardon as will fill the earth."'.
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) said: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "Allah, the Exalted, has said: 'O son of Adam! I shall go on forgiving you so long as you pray to Me and aspire for My forgiveness whatever may be your sins. O son of Adam! I do not care even if your sins should pile up to the sky and should you beg pardon of Me, I would forgive you. O son of Adam! If you come to Me with an earthful of sins and meet Me, not associating anything with Me in worship, I will certainly grant you as much pardon as will fill the earth."'.
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: I heard Rasulullah ﷺ saying, "Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, has bersabda: 'O putra Adam! I shall go on forgiving you jadi panjang as you pray to Me dan aspire for My ampunan whatever may be your sins. O putra Adam! I jangan care even if your sins should pile up to the sky dan should you beg pardon of Me, I would forgive you. O putra Adam! If you come to Me with an earthful of sins dan meet Me, not associating anything with Me in worship, I will certainly grant you as much pardon as will fill the earth."'.

ar: وعن ابن عمر رضي الله عنهما أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏"‏يا معشر النساء تصدقن، وأكثرن من الاستغفار، فإني رأيتكن أكثر أهل النار‏"‏ قالت امرأة منهن‏:‏ مالنا أكثر أهل النار‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏"‏تكثرن اللعن، وتكفرن العشير مارأيت من ناقصات عقل ودين أغلب لذي لب منكن‏"‏ قالت‏:‏ ما نقصان العقل والدين‏؟‏ قال‏"‏ ‏"‏شهادة امرأتين  بشهادة رجل، وتمكث الأيام لا تصلي‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Ibn 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) said: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "O women folk! You should give charity and be diligent in seeking Allah's forgiveness because I have seen (i.e., on the Night of the Ascension to the highest heavens) that dwellers of the Hell are women." A woman amongst them said: "Why is it that the majority of the dwellers of Hell are women?" The Prophet (ﷺ) replied, "You curse frequently and are ungrateful to your husbands. In spite of your lacking in wisdom and failing in religion, you are depriving the wisest of men of their intelligence." Upon this the woman asked: "What is the deficiency in our wisdom and in our religion?" He (ﷺ) replied, "Your lack of wisdom can be well judged from the fact that the evidence of two women is equal to that one man. You do not offer Salat (prayer) for some days and you do not fast (the whole of) Ramadan sometimes, it is a deficiency in religion.".
iwh_en: Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with them) said: the Prophet ﷺ said, "O women folk! You should give charity and be diligent in seeking Allah's forgiveness because I have seen (i.e., on the Night of the Ascension to the highest heavens) that dwellers of the Hell are women." A woman amongst them said: "Why is it that the majority of the dwellers of Hell are women?" the Prophet ﷺ replied, "You curse frequently and are ungrateful to your husbands. In spite of your lacking in wisdom and failing in religion, you are depriving the wisest of men of their intelligence." Upon this the woman asked: "What is the deficiency in our wisdom and in our religion?" He (ﷺ) replied, "Your lack of wisdom can be well judged from the fact that the evidence of two women is equal to that one man. You do not offer Salat (prayer) for some days and you do not fast (the whole of) Ramadan sometimes, it is a deficiency in religion.".
iwh_id: Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhum) berkata: Nabi ﷺ berkata, "O women folk! You should memberikan sedekah dan be diligent in seeking Allah's ampunan because I have seen (i.e., on the Night of the Ascension to the highest heavens) that dwellers of the Neraka are women." A woman amongst them berkata: "Why is it that the majority of the dwellers of Neraka are women?" Nabi ﷺ menjawab, "You curse frequently dan are ungrateful to your husbands. In spite of your lacking in wisdom dan failing in religion, you are depriving the wisest of men of their intelligence." Upon this the woman bertanya: "What is the deficiency in our wisdom dan in our religion?" He (ﷺ) menjawab, "Your lack of wisdom can be well judged from the fact that the evidence of two women is equal to that one man. You jangan offer Salat (shalat) for some days dan you jangan fast (the whole of) Ramadan sometimes, it is a deficiency in religion.".

ar: وعن جابر رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  ‏:‏ “يأكل أهل الجنة فيها ، ويشربون ، ولا يتغوطون، ولا يتمخطون، ولا يبولون، ولكن طعامهم ذلك جشاء كرشح المسك، يلهمون التسبيح والتكبير، كما يلهمون النفس‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن جابر رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم : “يأكل أهل الجنة فيها ، ويشربون ، ولا يتغوطون، ولا يتمخطون، ولا يبولون، ولكن طعامهم ذلك جشاء كرشح المسك، يلهمون التسبيح والتكبير، كما يلهمون النفس" ((رواه مسلم)).
isnad_ar: وعن جابر رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم : “يأكل أهل الجنة فيها
matn_ar: ويشربون ، ولا يتغوطون، ولا يتمخطون، ولا يبولون، ولكن طعامهم ذلك جشاء كرشح المسك، يلهمون التسبيح والتكبير، كما يلهمون النفس" ((رواه مسلم)).
matn_ar_clean: ويشربون ، ولا يتغوطون، ولا يتمخطون، ولا يبولون، ولكن طعامهم ذلك جشاء كرشح المسك، يلهمون التسبيح والتكبير، كما يلهمون النفس" ((رواه مسلم)).
sunnah_ref_en: Jabir (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The inhabitants of Jannah will eat and drink therein, but they will not have to pass excrement, to blow their noses or to urinate. Their food will be digested producing belch which will give out a smell like that of musk. They will be inspired to declare the freedom of Allah from imperfection and proclaim His Greatness as easily as you breathe.".
iwh_en: Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The inhabitants of Jannah will eat and drink therein, but they will not have to pass excrement, to blow their noses or to urinate. Their food will be digested producing belch which will give out a smell like that of musk. They will be inspired to declare the freedom of Allah from imperfection and proclaim His Greatness as easily as you breathe.".
iwh_id: Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "The inhabitants of Jannah will eat dan drink therein, namun mereka tidak akan have to pass excrement, to blow their noses or to urinate. Their food will be digested producing belch which will memberikan out a smell like that of musk. They will be inspired to declare the freedom of Allah from imperfection dan proclaim His Greatness as easily as you breathe.".

ar: وعن أبي  هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  ‏:‏ ‏"‏قال الله تعالى أعددت لعبادي الصالحين ما لا عين رأت ولا أذن سمعت ولا خطر على قلب بشر، واقرؤوا إن شئتم‏:‏ ‏{‏فلا تعلم نفس ما أخفي لهم من قرة أعين جزاء بما كانوا يعملون‏}‏ ‏(‏‏(‏السجدة‏:‏17‏)‏‏)‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Allah, the Exalted, has said: 'I have prepared for my righteous slaves what no eye has seen, no ear has heard, and the mind of no man has conceived.' If you wish, recite:'No person knows what is kept hidden for them of joy as a reward for what they used to do."' (32:17).
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Allah, the Exalted, has said: 'I have prepared for my righteous slaves what no eye has seen, no ear has heard, and the mind of no man has conceived.' If you wish, recite:'No person knows what is kept hidden for them of joy as a reward for what they used to do."' (32:17).
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, has bersabda: 'I have prepared for my righteous slaves what no eye has seen, no ear has heard, and the mind of no man has conceived.' If you wish, membaca:'No person knows what is menjaga hidden for them of joy as a reward for what they biasa do."' (32:17).

ar:
وعنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  ‏
"‏أول زمرة يدخلون الجنة على صورة القمر ليلة البدر، ثم الذين يلونهم على أشد كوكب دري في السماء إضاءة، لا يبولون ولا يتغوطون، ولا يتفلون، ولا يتمخطون، أمشاطهم الذهب، وريحهم المسك، ومجامرهم الألوة -عود الطيب- أزواجهم الحورالعين، على خلق رجل واحد، على صورة أبيهم آدم ستون ذراعاً في السماء‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏  
وفي رواية للبخاري ومسلم‏:‏ آنيتهم فيها الذهب، ورشحهم المسك، ولكل واحد منهم زوجتان يرى مخ ساقهما من وراء اللحم من الحسن، لا اختلاف بينهم ، ولا تباغض‏:‏ قلوبهم قلب رجل واحد، يسبحون الله بكرة وعشياً‏. قوله: (على خلق رجل واحد). رواه بعضهم بفتح الخاء واسكان اللام وبعضهم بضمهما وكلاهما صحيح.

قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم 
"أول زمرة يدخلون الجنة على صورة القمر ليلة البدر، ثم الذين يلونهم على أشد كوكب دري في السماء إضاءة، لا يبولون ولا يتغوطون، ولا يتفلون، ولا يتمخطون، أمشاطهم الذهب، وريحهم المسك، ومجامرهم الألوة -عود الطيب- أزواجهم الحورالعين، على خلق رجل واحد، على صورة أبيهم آدم ستون ذراعا في السماء" ((متفق عليه)). 
وفي رواية للبخاري ومسلم: آنيتهم فيها الذهب، ورشحهم المسك، ولكل واحد منهم زوجتان يرى مخ ساقهما من وراء اللحم من الحسن، لا اختلاف بينهم ، ولا تباغض: قلوبهم قلب رجل واحد، يسبحون الله بكرة وعشيا. قوله: (على خلق رجل واحد). رواه بعضهم بفتح الخاء واسكان اللام وبعضهم بضمهما وكلاهما صحيح.
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The first group (of people) to enter Jannah will be shining like the moon on a full-moon night. Then will come those who follow them who will be like the most shining planet in the sky. They will not stand in need of urinating or relieving of nature or of spitting or blowing their noses. Their combs will be of gold and their sweat will smell like musk; in their censers the aloes-wood will be used. Their wives will be large eyed maidens. All men will be alike in the form of their father 'Adam, sixty cubits tall."Another narration is: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Their utensils will be of gold, their perspiration will smell like musk; everyone of them will have two wives; the marrow of the bones of the wives' legs will be seen through the flesh out of excessive beauty. They (i.e., the people of Jannah) will neither have difference, nor enmity (hatred) amongst themselves; their hearts will be as if one heart, and they will be glorifying Allah in the morning and in the afternoon.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The first group (of people) to enter Jannah will be shining like the moon on a full-moon night. Then will come those who follow them who will be like the most shining planet in the sky. They will not stand in need of urinating or relieving of nature or of spitting or blowing their noses. Their combs will be of gold and their sweat will smell like musk; in their censers the aloes-wood will be used. Their wives will be large eyed maidens. All men will be alike in the form of their father 'Adam, sixty cubits tall."Another narration is: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Their utensils will be of gold, their perspiration will smell like musk; everyone of them will have two wives; the marrow of the bones of the wives' legs will be seen through the flesh out of excessive beauty. They (i.e., the people of Jannah) will neither have difference, nor enmity (hatred) amongst themselves; their hearts will be as if one heart, and they will be glorifying Allah in the morning and in the afternoon.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "The pertama group (of orang-orang) to masuk ke Jannah will be shining like the moon on a full-moon night. Kemudian will come those who follow them who will be like the most shining planet in the sky. They tidak akan berdiri in need of urinating or relieving of nature or of spitting or blowing their noses. Their combs will be of gold dan their sweat will smell like musk; in their censers the aloes-wood will be menggunakan. Their wives will be besar eyed maidens. All men will be alike in the form of their father 'Adam, sixty cubits tall."Another narration is: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Their utensils will be of gold, their perspiration will smell like musk; everyone of them will have two wives; the marrow of the bones of the wives' legs will be seen melalui the flesh out of excessive beauty. They (i.e., the orang-orang of Jannah) will neither have difference, dan tidak enmity (hatred) amongst themselves; their hearts will be as if one heart, dan mereka will be glorifying Allah in the morning dan in the afternoon.".

وعن المغيرة بن شعبة رضي الله عنه عن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏سأل موسى صلى الله عليه وسلم  ربه، ما أدنى أهل الجنة منزلة ‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ هو رجل يجيء بعد ما أدخل أهل الجنة-الجنة، فيقال له ‏:‏ ادخل الجنة، فيقول‏:‏ أي رب كيف وقد نزل الناس منازلهم، وأخذوا أخذاتهم‏؟‏ فيقول له‏:‏ أترضى أن يكون لك مثل ملك ملك من ملوك الدنيا‏؟‏ فيقول‏:‏ رضيت رب فيقول‏:‏ لك ذلك ومثله ومثله ومثله ومثله، فيقول في الخامسة‏:‏ رضيت يا رب فيقول‏:‏ هذا لك وعشرة أمثاله، ولك ما اشتهيت نفسك، ولذت عينك، فيقول‏:‏ رضيت رب، قال رب فأعلاهم منزلة‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ أولئك الذين أردت؛ غرست كرامتهم بيدي، وختمت عليها، فلم تر عين، ولم تسمع أذن، ولم يخطر على قلب بشر‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Al-Mughirah bin Shu'bah (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Musa (Moses) (ﷺ) asked his Rubb: 'Who amongst the inhabitants of Jannah will be the lowest in rank?' He said: 'It will be a person who will be admitted into Jannah last of all when all the dwellers of Jannah have entered Jannah. It will be said to him: Enter Jannah. But he will say: O my Rubb! How should I enter while the people have settled in their apartments and taken their shares? It will be said to him: Will you be satisfied and pleased if you have a kingdom like that of a monarch of the world? He will say: I will be content, my Rubb. Allah will say: For you is that, and like that and like that and like that and like that. He will say at the fifth time: I am well-pleased, my Rubb. Allah will say: It is for you and ten times more like it. You will have whatever your soul desires and whatever your eyes could delight in. He will say: I am well-pleased, my Rubb.' Musa (ﷺ) said: 'Who will be of the highest rank in Jannah.' Allah said: 'They are those whom I chose and I established their honour with My Own Hand. I attest with My Seal that they will be blessed with such bounties as no eye has seen, no ear has heard and no human mind has perceived."'.

He said: 'It will be a person who will be admitted into Jannah last of all when all the dwellers of Jannah have entered Jannah. It will be said to him: Enter Jannah. But he will say: O my Rubb! How should I enter while the people have settled in their apartments and taken their shares? It will be said to him: Will you be satisfied and pleased if you have a kingdom like that of a monarch of the world? He will say: I will be content, my Rubb. Allah will say: For you is that, and like that and like that and like that and like that. He will say at the fifth time: I am well-pleased, my Rubb. Allah will say: It is for you and ten times more like it. You will have whatever your soul desires and whatever your eyes could delight in. He will say: I am well-pleased, my Rubb.' Musa (ﷺ) said: 'Who will be of the highest rank in Jannah.' Allah said: 'They are those whom I chose and I established their honour with My Own Hand. I attest with My Seal that they will be blessed with such bounties as no eye has seen, no ear has heard and no human mind has perceived."'.
iwh_id: Al-Mughirah bin Shu'bah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Musa (Moses) (ﷺ) bertanya his Rubb: 'Who amongst the inhabitants of Jannah will be the lowest in rank?' He bersabda: 'It will be seseorang who will be admitted into Jannah terakhir of all when all the dwellers of Jannah have entered Jannah. It will be bersabda to him: Enter Jannah. Namun ia will say: O my Rubb! How should I masuk ke while the orang-orang have settled in their apartments dan taken their shares? It will be bersabda to him: Will you be satisfied dan pleased if you have a kingdom like that of a monarch of dunia? He will say: I will be content, my Rubb. Allah will say: For you is that, and like that dan like that dan like that dan like that. He will say at the fifth time: I am well-pleased, my Rubb. Allah will say: It is for you dan ten times more like it. You will have whatever your soul desires dan whatever your eyes could delight in. He will say: I am well-pleased, my Rubb.' Musa (ﷺ) bersabda: 'Who will be of the highest rank in Jannah.' Allah bersabda: 'They are those whom I chose dan aku established their honour with My Own Hand. I attest with My Seal that they will be blessed with such bounties as no eye has seen, no ear has heard dan no human mind has perceived."'.

ar: وعن ابن مسعود رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏"‏إني لأعلم آخر النار خروجاً منها، وآخر أهل الجنة دخولاً الجنة، رجل يخرج من النار حبوا؛ فيقول الله عز وجل له‏:‏ اذهب فادخل الجنة، فيأتيها، فيخيل إليه أنها ملأى، فيرجع فيقول‏:‏ يا رب وجدتها ملأى، فيقول الله عز وجل له‏:‏ اذهب فادخل الجنة، فيرجع ، فيقول‏:‏ يا رب وجدتها ملأى، في سورة يقول الله عز وجل له ‏:‏ اذهب فادخل الجنة ، فيأتيها، فيخيل إليه أنها ملأى، فيرجع، فيقول‏:‏ يا رب وجدتها ملأى‏!‏ فيقول الله عز وجل له‏:‏ اذهب فادخل الجنة، فإن لك مثل الدنيا وعشرة أمثالها أو إن لك مثل عشرة أمثال الدنيا، فيقول‏:‏ أتسخر بي، أو تضحك بي وأنت الملك” قال‏:‏ فلقد رأيت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  ضحك حتى بدت نواجذه فكان يقول‏:‏ ‏"‏ذلك أدنى أهل الجنة منزلة‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: 'Abdullah bin Mas'ud (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "I know of the last of the inhabitants of the Hell to be taken out from there and the last one to enter Jannah. He is a man who will come out of the Fire, crawling on all fours. Allah, the Rubb of glory and honour will say to him: 'Go and enter Jannah.' He will go to it and think that it is full up. He will then come back and say: 'O my Rubb, it is full up.' Allah will say to him: 'Go and enter Jannah.' He will again go to it and think that it is full up. So he will turn back. Allah will again say: 'Go and enter Jannah. For you have what is equal to ten times the world.' He will say: 'Are You making fun of me while You are the King?" At this I (i.e., the narrator) saw the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) laugh till his premolars were visible and he said, "Such man will be the last dweller of Jannah in its lowest rank.".
iwh_en: 'Abdullah bin Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) reported: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "I know of the last of the inhabitants of the Hell to be taken out from there and the last one to enter Jannah. He is a man who will come out of the Fire, crawling on all fours. Allah, the Rubb of glory and honour will say to him: 'Go and enter Jannah.' He will go to it and think that it is full up. He will then come back and say: 'O my Rubb, it is full up.' Allah will say to him: 'Go and enter Jannah.' He will again go to it and think that it is full up. So he will turn back. Allah will again say: 'Go and enter Jannah. For you have what is equal to ten times the world.' He will say: 'Are You making fun of me while You are the King?" At this I (i.e., the narrator) saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ laugh till his premolars were visible and he said, "Such man will be the last dweller of Jannah in its lowest rank.".
iwh_id: 'Abdullah bin Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "I mengetahui of the terakhir of the inhabitants of the Hell to be taken out from there dan the terakhir one to masuk ke Jannah. He is seorang laki-laki who will come out of the Fire, crawling on all fours. Allah, the Rubb of glory dan honour will say to him: 'Go dan masuk ke Jannah.' He will go to it dan berpikir that it is full up. He will kemudian come back dan berkata: 'O my Rubb, it is full up.' Allah will say to him: 'Go dan masuk ke Jannah.' He will again go to it dan berpikir that it is full up. Jadi he will turn back. Allah will again say: 'Go dan masuk ke Jannah. For you have what is equal to ten times dunia.' He will say: 'Are You making fun of me while You are the King?" At this I (i.e., the narrator) saw Rasulullah ﷺ laugh till his premolars were visible dan ia bersabda, "Such man will be the terakhir dweller of Jannah in its lowest rank.".

ar: وعن أبي  موسى رضي الله عنه أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏"‏إن للمؤمن في الجنة لخيمة من لؤلؤة واحدة مجوفة طولها في السماء ستون ميلاً، للمؤمن فيها أهلون، يطوف عليهم المؤمن فلا يرى بعضهم بعضاً، ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏«الميل» : ستة آلاف ذراع

matn_ar: ً، للمؤمن فيها أهلون، يطوف عليهم المؤمن فلا يرى بعضهم بعضاً، ((متفق عليه)).«الميل» : ستة آلاف ذراع

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Musa (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "In Jannah the believer will have a tent made of a single hollowed pearl of which the length will be sixty miles in the sky. The believer will have his wives with him and he will visit them and they will not be able to see one another.".
iwh_en: Abu Musa (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Prophet ﷺ said, "In Jannah the believer will have a tent made of a single hollowed pearl of which the length will be sixty miles in the sky. The believer will have his wives with him and he will visit them and they will not be able to see one another.".
iwh_id: Abu Musa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: Nabi ﷺ berkata, "In Jannah the believer will have a tent membuat of a single hollowed pearl of which the length will be sixty miles in the sky. The believer will have istri-istrinya bersamanya dan ia will visit them dan mereka tidak akan be able to see satu sama lain.".

ar:
وعن أبي  سعيد الخدري رضي الله عنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏"‏إن في الجنة لشجرة يسير الراكب الجواد المضمر السريع مائة سنة ما يقطعها ‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏ 
وروياه في ‏"‏الصحيحين‏"‏ أيضاً من رواية أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ ‏"‏يسير الراكب في سورة في ظلها سنة ما يقطعها‏"‏‏.‏

وروياه في "الصحيحين" أيضاً من رواية أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: "يسير الراكب في سورة في ظلها سنة ما يقطعها".

matn_ar: وروياه في "الصحيحين" أيضاً من رواية أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: "يسير الراكب في سورة في ظلها سنة ما يقطعها".
matn_ar_clean: وروياه في "الصحيحين" أيضا من رواية أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: "يسير الراكب في سورة في ظلها سنة ما يقطعها".
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "There is a tree in Jannah that is so huge that if a rider of a swift horse has to cover its distance from one end to another in one hundred years, he will not be able to do so."Another narration from Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) is: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "A rider will not be able to cross its (the tree's) shade even after travelling for one hundred years."
iwh_en: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Prophet ﷺ said, "There is a tree in Jannah that is so huge that if a rider of a swift horse has to cover its distance from one end to another in one hundred years, he will not be able to do so."Another narration from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) is: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "A rider will not be able to cross its (the tree's) shade even after travelling for one hundred years."
iwh_id: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: Nabi ﷺ berkata, "There is a tree in Jannah that is jadi huge that if a rider of a swift horse has to cover its distance from one end to another in one hundred years, he tidak akan be able to do jadi."Another narration from Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) is: Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "A rider tidak akan be able to cross its (the tree's) shade even setelah travelling for one hundred years."

ar: وعنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏"‏إن أهل الجنة ليتراءون أهل الغرف من فوقهم كما تراءون الكوكب الدري الغابر في الأفق من المشرق أو المغرب لتفاضل ملا بينهم‏"‏ قالوا‏:‏ يا رسول الله، تلك منازل الأنبياء لا يبلغها غيرهم‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ “بلى والذي نفسي بيده رجال آمنوا بالله وصدقوا المرسلين‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: وعنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏"‏إن أهل الجنة ليتراءون أهل الغرف من فوقهم كما تراءون الكوكب الدري الغابر في الأفق من المشرق أو المغرب لتفاضل ملا بينهم‏"‏ قالوا‏:‏ يا رسول الله، تلك منازل الأنبياء لا يبلغها غيرهم‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ “بلى والذي نفسي بيده رجال آمنوا بالله وصدقوا المرسلين‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "The dwellers of Jannah will look at those in the upper abodes above them as you look at a shining star which remains in the eastern or western horizon; such will be the difference in superiority which some of them have over others." The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) was asked: "Will those be the dwellings of the Prophets which no one else will be able to reach?" He (ﷺ) replied, "Yes, but by Him in Whose Hand my soul is! men who believed in Allah and acknowledged the truthfulness of the Messengers will reach them.".
iwh_en: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Prophet ﷺ said, "The dwellers of Jannah will look at those in the upper abodes above them as you look at a shining star which remains in the eastern or western horizon; such will be the difference in superiority which some of them have over others." the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked: "Will those be the dwellings of the Prophet ﷺs which no one else will be able to reach?" He (ﷺ) replied, "Yes, but by Him in Whose Hand my soul is! men who believed in Allah and acknowledged the truthfulness of the Messengers will reach them.".
iwh_id: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: Nabi ﷺ berkata, "The dwellers of Jannah will look at those in the upper abodes di atas them as you look at a shining star which remains in the eastern or western horizon; such will be the difference in superiority which some of them have over others." Rasulullah ﷺ was bertanya: "Will those be the dwellings of Nabi ﷺs which no one else will be able to reach?" He (ﷺ) menjawab, "Yes, namun by Him in Whose Hand my soul is! men who believed in Allah dan acknowledged the truthfulness of Rasulullahs will reach them.".

ar:
وعن أبي  هريرة رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏لقاب قوس في الجنة خير مما تطلع عليه الشمس أو تغرب‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "A space in Jannah equal to the distance between the middle and the end of a bow will be better than all that upon which the sun rises and sets.".
iwh_en: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "A space in Jannah equal to the distance between the middle and the end of a bow will be better than all that upon which the sun rises and sets.".
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "A space in Jannah equal to the distance antara the middle dan the end of a bow will be better than all that upon which the sun rises dan sets.".

ar:
وعن أنس رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إن في الجنة سوقاً يأتونها كل جمعة‏.‏ فتهب ريح الشمال، فتحثوا في وجوههم وثيابهم، فيزدادون حسناً وجمالاً فيرجعون إلى أهليهم، وقد ازدادوا حسناً وجمالاً، فيقول لهم أهلوهم‏:‏ والله لقد ازددتم حسناً وجمالاً‏!‏ فيقولون‏:‏ وأنتم والله لقد ازددتم بعدنا حسناً وجمالاً‏!‏‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: "إن في الجنة سوقا يأتونها كل جمعة. فتهب ريح الشمال، فتحثوا في وجوههم وثيابهم، فيزدادون حسنا وجمالا فيرجعون إلى أهليهم، وقد ازدادوا حسنا وجمالا، فيقول لهم أهلوهم: والله لقد ازددتم حسنا وجمالا! فيقولون: وأنتم والله لقد ازددتم بعدنا حسنا وجمالا!" ((رواه مسلم)).
sunnah_ref_en: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "In Jannah there is a market to which the people will come every Friday. The northern wind will blow and shower fragrance on their faces and clothes and, consequently, it will enhance their beauty and loveliness. They will then return to their wives who will also have increased in their beauty and loveliness, and their families will say to them: 'We swear by Allah that you have been increased in beauty and loveliness since leaving us.' Thereupon they will reply: 'We swear by Allah that you have also been increased in beauty and loveliness since we left you."'.
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "In Jannah there is a market to which the people will come every Friday. The northern wind will blow and shower fragrance on their faces and clothes and, consequently, it will enhance their beauty and loveliness. They will then return to their wives who will also have increased in their beauty and loveliness, and their families will say to them: 'We swear by Allah that you have been increased in beauty and loveliness since leaving us.' Thereupon they will reply: 'We swear by Allah that you have also been increased in beauty and loveliness since we left you."'.
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "In Jannah there is a market to which the orang-orang will come every Friday. The northern wind will blow dan shower fragrance on their faces dan clothes and, consequently, it will enhance their beauty dan loveliness. They will kemudian return to their wives who will juga have increased in their beauty dan loveliness, and their families will say to them: 'We swear by Allah that you have been increased in beauty dan loveliness sejak meninggalkan us.' Thereupon they will reply: 'We swear by Allah that you have juga been increased in beauty dan loveliness sejak we kiri you."'.

ar:
وعن سهل بن سعد رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إن أهل الجنة ليتراءون الغرف في الجنة كما تتراءون الكوكب في السماء‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The dwellers of Jannah will see the upper abodes of Jannah as you see the stars in the sky.".
iwh_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The dwellers of Jannah will see the upper abodes of Jannah as you see the stars in the sky.".
iwh_id: Sahl bin Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "The dwellers of Jannah will see the upper abodes of Jannah as you see the stars in the sky.".

ar:
وعنه رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ شهدت من النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  مجلساً وصف فيه الجنة حتى انتهى، ثم قال في آخر حديثه‏:‏ ‏
"‏فيها مالا عين رأت، ولا أذن سمعت، ولا خطر على قلب بشر‏"‏ ثم قرأ ‏{‏تتجافى جنوبهم عن المضاجع‏}‏ إلى قوله تعالى‏:‏ ‏{‏فلا تعلم نفس ما أخفي لهم من قرة أعين‏}‏‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (May Allah be pleased with him) said: I was in the company of the Prophet (ﷺ). He gave a description of Jannah and concluded with these words, "There will be bounties which no eye has seen, no ear has heard and no human heart has ever perceived." He (ﷺ) then recited this Verse:"Their sides forsake their beds, to invoke their Rubb in fear and hope, and they spend (in charity in Allah's Cause) out of what We have bestowed on them. No person knows what is kept hidden for them of joy..." (32:16,17).
iwh_en: Sahl bin Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) said: I was in the company of the Prophet ﷺ. He gave a description of Jannah and concluded with these words, "There will be bounties which no eye has seen, no ear has heard and no human heart has ever perceived." He (ﷺ) then recited this Verse:"Their sides forsake their beds, to invoke their Rubb in fear and hope, and they spend (in charity in Allah's Cause) out of what We have bestowed on them. No person knows what is kept hidden for them of joy..." (32:16,17).
iwh_id: Sahl bin Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: I was in the company of Nabi ﷺ. He memberikan a gambaran of Jannah dan concluded with these words, "There will be bounties which no eye has seen, no ear has mendengar dan no human heart has ever perceived." He (ﷺ) kemudian recited this Verse:"Their sides forsake their beds, to invoke their Rubb in fear dan hope, dan mereka spend (in sedekah in Allah's Cause) out of what We have bestowed on them. No person knows what is menjaga hidden for them of joy..." (32:16,17).

ar: وعن أبي  سعيد وأبي هريرة رضي الله عنهما أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ “إذا دخل أهل الجنة - الجنة- ينادي مناد‏:‏ إن لكم أن تحيوا، فلا تموتوا أبداً، وإن لكم أن تصحوا، فلا تسقموا أبداً، وإن لكم أن تشبوا فلا تهرموا أبداً، وإن لكم أن تنعموا، فلا تبأسوا أبداً‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
ar_clean: وعن أبي سعيد وأبي هريرة رضي الله عنهما أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: “إذا دخل أهل الجنة - الجنة- ينادي مناد: إن لكم أن تحيوا، فلا تموتوا أبداً، وإن لكم أن تصحوا، فلا تسقموا أبداً، وإن لكم أن تشبوا فلا تهرموا أبداً، وإن لكم أن تنعموا، فلا تبأسوا أبداً" ((رواه مسلم)).
isnad_ar: وعن أبي سعيد وأبي هريرة رضي الله عنهما أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال: “إذا دخل أهل الجنة - الجنة- ينادي مناد: إن لكم أن تحيوا
matn_ar: فلا تموتوا أبداً، وإن لكم أن تصحوا، فلا تسقموا أبداً، وإن لكم أن تشبوا فلا تهرموا أبداً، وإن لكم أن تنعموا، فلا تبأسوا أبداً" ((رواه مسلم)).
matn_ar_clean: فلا تموتوا أبدا، وإن لكم أن تصحوا، فلا تسقموا أبدا، وإن لكم أن تشبوا فلا تهرموا أبدا، وإن لكم أن تنعموا، فلا تبأسوا أبدا" ((رواه مسلم)).
sunnah_ref_en: Abu Sa'id and Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When the dwellers of Jannah enter Jannah, an announcer will call: (You have a promise from Allah that) you will live therein and you will never die; you will stay healthy therein and you will never fall ill; you will stay young and you will never become old; you will be under a constant bliss and you will never feel miserable.".
iwh_en: Abu Sa'id and Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "When the dwellers of Jannah enter Jannah, an announcer will call: (You have a promise from Allah that) you will live therein and you will never die; you will stay healthy therein and you will never fall ill; you will stay young and you will never become old; you will be under a constant bliss and you will never feel miserable.".
iwh_id: Abu Sa'id and Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "When the dwellers of Jannah masuk ke Jannah, an announcer will call: (You have a promise from Allah that) you will live therein dan you will never die; you will stay healthy therein dan you will never fall ill; you will stay muda dan you will never become tua; you will be under a constant bliss dan you will never feel miserable.".

ar:
وعن أبي  هريرة رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إن أدنى مقعد أحدكم من الجنة أن يقول له‏:‏ تمن فيتمنى ويتمنى، فيقول له‏:‏ هل تمنيت‏؟‏ فيقول‏:‏ نعم، فيقول له‏:‏ فإن لك ما تمنيت ومثله معه‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The lowest place of any of you in Jannah will be that Allah will tell him to express his wish. He will wish and wish again. Allah will then ask him: 'Have you expressed your wish?' He will answer: 'Yes, I have.' Allah will say: 'You will have what you have wished for and the like thereof along with it."'.

Allah will kemudian ask him: 'Have you expressed your wish?' He will answer: 'Yes, I have.' Allah will say: 'You will have what you have wished for dan the like thereof along with it."'.

ar:
وعن أبي  سعيد الخدري رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إن الله عز وجل يقول لأهل الجنة‏:‏ يا أهل الجنة، فيقولون ‏:‏ لبيك ربنا وسعديك، والخير في يديك فيقول‏:‏ هل رضيتم‏؟‏ فيقولون‏:‏ وما لنا لا نرضى يا ربنا وقد أعطيتنا مالم تعط أحداً من خلقك‏!‏ فيقول‏:‏ ألا أعطيكم أفضل من ذلك فيقولون‏:‏ وأي شيء أفضل من ذلك‏؟‏ فيقول‏:‏ أحل عليكم رضواني، فلا أسخط عليكم بعده أبداً‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (May Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Allah, the Rubb of honour and glory, will say to the inhabitants of Jannah: 'O inhabitants of Jannah!' They will respond: 'Here we are! At Your service, O our Rubb. All good is in Your Hand!' He will ask them: 'Are you pleased?' They will reply: 'Why should we not be pleased, O Rubb, when You have given us what You have not given to any of Your creatures?' Allah will say: 'Shall I not give you something better than that?' They will ask: 'O Rubb! What can be better than that?' Allah will say: 'I shall bestow My Pleasure upon you and I shall never be displeased with you."'.

They will reply: 'Why should we not be pleased, O Rubb, when You have given us what You have not given to any of Your creatures?' Allah will say: 'Shall I not give you something better than that?' They will ask: 'O Rubb! What can be better than that?' Allah will say: 'I shall bestow My Pleasure upon you and I shall never be displeased with you."'.
iwh_id: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bersabda: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Allah, the Rubb of honour dan glory, will say to the inhabitants of Jannah: 'O inhabitants of Jannah!' They will respond: 'Here we are! At Your service, O our Rubb. All baik is in Your Hand!' He will ask them: 'Are you pleased?' They will ask: 'O Rubb! What can be better than that?' Allah will say: 'I shall bestow My Pleasure upon you dan aku shall never be displeased with you."'.

ar:
وعن جرير بن عبد الله رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ كنا عند رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  فنظر إلى القمر ليلة البدر، وقال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إنكم سترون ربكم عياناً كما ترون هذا القمر، لا تضامون في رؤيته‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏ ‏.‏

"إنكم سترون ربكم عيانا كما ترون هذا القمر، لا تضامون في رؤيته" ((متفق عليه)). .
sunnah_ref_en: Jarir bin 'Abdullah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: We were sitting with the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) when he looked at the full moon and observed, "You shall see your Rubb in the Hereafter as you are seeing this moon; and you will not feel the slightest inconvenience in seeing Him.".
iwh_en: Jarir bin 'Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that we were sitting with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he looked at the full moon and observed, "You shall see your Rubb in the Hereafter as you are seeing this moon; and you will not feel the slightest inconvenience in seeing Him.".
iwh_id: Jarir bin 'Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa we sedang duduk with Rasulullah ﷺ ketika ia looked at the full moon dan observed, "You shall see your Rubb di Akhirat as you are seeing this moon; dan you tidak akan feel the slightest inconvenience in seeing Him.".

ar:
وعن صهيب رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏"‏إذا دخل أهل الجنة -الجنة- يقول الله تبارك وتعالى‏:‏ تريدون شيئاً أزيدكم‏؟‏ فيقولون‏:‏ ألم تبيض وجوهنا‏؟‏ ألم تدخلنا الجنة وتنجنا من النار‏؟‏ فيكشف الحجاب، فما أعطو شيئاً أحب إليهم من النظر إلى ربهم‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏ 

قال الله تعالى‏:‏ ‏{‏إن الذين آمنوا وعملوا الصالحات يهديهم ربهم بإيمانهم تجري من تحتهم الأنهار في جنات النعيم* دعواهم فيها سبحانك اللهم وتحيتهم فيها سلام وآخر دعواهم أن الحمد لله رب العالمين‏}‏ ‏(‏‏(‏يونس‏:‏9،10‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
الحمد لله الذي هدانا لهذا وما كنا لنهتدى لولا أن هدانا الله‏.‏ اللهم صل على محمد وعلى آل محمد، كما صليت على إبراهيم وعلى آل إبراهيم ، وبارك على محمد، وعلى آل محمد، كما باركت على إبراهيم وعلى آل إبراهيم ، إنك حميد مجيد‏.‏
قال مؤلفه رضي الله عنه ‏:‏ ‏"‏ فرغت منه يوم الاثنين رابع شهر رمضان سنة سبعين وستمائة‏"‏‏.‏

sunnah_ref_en: Suhaib (May Allah be pleased with him) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When the inhabitants of Jannah enter Jannah, Allah, the Glorious and Exalted, will say to them: 'Do you wish me to give you anything more?' They will reply: 'Have You not made our faces bright? Have You not brought us into Jannah and delivered us from the Hell?' And Allah will remove the Veil. The (dwellers of Jannah) will feel that they have not been awarded anything dearer to them than looking at their Rubb."." (10:9,10)

The (dwellers of Jannah) will feel that they have not been awarded anything dearer to them than looking at their Rubb."." (10:9,10)

They will reply: 'Have You not membuat our faces bright? Have You not brought us into Jannah dan delivered us from the Hell?' And Allah will melepas the Veil. The (dwellers of Jannah) will feel that they belum been awarded anything dearer to them than looking at their Rubb."." (10:9,10)
